productDisplayName: Puma Men White Driving Power Lo Shoes
description: Style Note These Driving Power Lo shoes from puma are a spin off from the high-top version and they're a perfect choice for all speed freaks. These shoes are perfect for those who love a little show off drama in their casual ensembles. Product Details White shoe with synthetic upper, central lace-ups, overlays and decorative stitched detailing Branding on the tongue and heel Padded tongue and inner Thick rubber outsole TPU outsole with patterned grooves, diamond shaped plastic inlay and branding on the midfoot Material and Care Synthetic Wipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash
